overview.title: Aipify Platform Admin
overview.subtitle: Master-level control for Aipify Group AS — customers, subscriptions, installs, and platform health.
overview.note: Customer Control Center lives at /dashboard. This area is internal-only and spans all tenants.

customers.title: Customers
customers.subtitle: All customer organizations on the Aipify platform.
customers.pilotNote: Unonight is the first pilot customer. Each row represents an isolated tenant scoped by company_id.

subscriptions.title: Subscriptions
subscriptions.subtitle: Manage plans and subscription lifecycle across customers.
subscriptions.comingSoon: Subscription management will be available in a future release.

installations.title: Installations
installations.subtitle: Cross-tenant view of all installations and sync health.
installations.comingSoon: Platform-wide installation management will be available in a future release.

stats.title: Platform statistics
stats.subtitle: Usage, growth, and health metrics across the platform.
stats.comingSoon: Platform statistics will be available in a future release.

billing.title: Billing
billing.subtitle: Invoices, revenue, and billing operations.
billing.comingSoon: Platform billing will be available in a future release.

support.title: Support
support.subtitle: Internal support queue and customer escalations.
support.comingSoon: Platform support tools will be available in a future release.

system.title: System status
system.subtitle: Core services, uptime, and incident visibility.
system.comingSoon: System status dashboard will be available in a future release.
